changes.summary: Migrated synthetic access fixture from cohorts/wave shape to pilotLaunches/accessPools with inviteCodes linked by accessPoolKey.
Added focused bootstrap checks for active pilotLaunch/accessPool shape, referential links and absence of legacy cohort/wave keys or string values.
Bumped local_init bootstrap version/checksum for the seed-contract shape change.
Documented that demo bootstrap fixture follows active tenant/pilotLaunch/accessPool/invite terminology and is guarded against legacy cohort/wave drift.

checks.evidence: No matches in content/fixtures/demo-bootstrap.json; remaining matches are the intentional guard and doc wording.

content_review.fixture_data: Synthetic demo fixture only; no real employee, customer, personal or financial data introduced.
content_review.financial_wording: No new financial advice wording or monetary reward modeling introduced; rewards still use non-monetary pointsPrice.
content_review.human_gate: No final approval is claimed for production/public copy, legal text, financial correctness or real reward operations.
